title: Asymptotic Analysis Q4 - Doubling Outer with Linear Inner
general_notes: No double deduction (except in points 9 and 10).
Students can use Theta or big-O notation with tight bounds.
Intended answers: T_f(N) = Theta(N log N) and T_g(N) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Splitting code into parts + referencing line numbers
rubric_points.target: Clear separation of f and g; loops vs non-loop code identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Analysis does not clearly separate f vs g, or loops vs non-loops, and line numbers are unclear or missing.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some attempt to separate components or refer to line numbers, but structure is incomplete or ambiguous.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clear separation of f and g; the doubling loop and the linear loop are identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

rubric_points.name: Constant-time non-loop parts
rubric_points.target: All non-loop code in f and g is Theta(1).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Non-loop code not analysed or incorrectly claimed to be non-constant.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some constant-time segments identified but others missing.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: All non-loop regions stated as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) iterations because k doubles each iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(log N) (e.g. claims Theta(N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) but does not explain the doubling of k.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(log N) by explaining that k starts at 1 and is multiplied by 2 each iteration, so the loop runs until k exceeds N.

rubric_points.name: f(): Cost per iteration
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) per iteration, dominated by the call to g(a, k).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims Theta(1) per iteration or ignores the cost of g.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Recognises the call to g but does not establish Theta(N) per iteration.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: States Theta(N) per iteration, justified by g performing a linear scan of a regardless of x.

rubric_points.name: f(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(N log N) from Theta(log N) iterations x Theta(N) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: No multiplication of iteration count x per-iteration cost, or unrelated complexity.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Multiplies own values but final simplification or reasoning is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(log N) x Theta(N) = Theta(N log N), with justification.

rubric_points.name: g(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) iterations of the for loop over a.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but explanation incomplete.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(N) because i runs from 0 to a.length - 1 regardless of x.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests constant time but lacks explicit Theta(1) justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Each iteration Theta(1): one array read, one comparison, possibly one += assignment.

rubric_points.name: g(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) = Theta(N) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Does not combine iteration count x per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Attempts multiplication using own values but unclear or partially derived.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N) x Theta(1) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of g
rubric_points.target: T_g(N) = Theta(N), summing constant parts and the loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Runtime absent or incompatible with earlier analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N) + Theta(1) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of f
rubric_points.target: T_f(N) = Theta(N log N), accounting for non-loop parts + loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Final complexity missing/incorrect.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N log N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N log N) + Theta(1) = Theta(N log N).
